modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty adding Slido to Microsoft PowerPoint presentation.

full_description_text: The user is trying to incorporate Slido into their PowerPoint slides. They are unsure of the steps needed to complete this task. The issue arose during a live call with the help desk. The user expressed confusion about how to proceed with the integration.
short_description: Difficulty adding Slido to Microsoft PowerPoint presentation.
description: The user is trying to incorporate Slido into their PowerPoint slides. They are unsure of the steps needed to complete this task. The issue arose during a live call with the help desk. The user expressed confusion about how to proceed with the integration.
